name: llm-language
description: Self-evolving prompt meta-compiler with mandatory codebase awareness, CLAUDE.md auto-maintenance, ROSETTA.md persistent memory, and 100+ scientific papers. v3.1: Phase 0.6 CLAUDE.md generation/update (Codified Context methodology), /llm-language:update sub-skill for self-evolution research, 8 scoring dimensions, threshold 9.2, critic anchor at 5.
